note: 2026-07-08 morning (cycle 7.morning): Server was found UP at slot start (correct, standing rule intact) and stopped cleanly via the canonical WINDOWTITLE kill. AUDIT of session 2026-07-08T01-42-03 (~6h real / frame 0->509,100, ~4.7 sim-hours -- well past the 4h threshold, first FULL non-provisional verdict of this cadence): PASS on all active flags. Phase C (GOODS_ENABLED): structure_condition drifted 95.3->69.7 avg as the village nearly quadrupled (34->123 structures), 0 ruins throughout, disrepair only ever transient -- this is the designed ~5.8h-to-disrepair decay curve working as tuned, not a bug; watch item for a longer soak: confirm condition stabilizes rather than trending toward the 30 floor as structure count keeps growing. Phase D (TECH_TREE_ENABLED): tier gating correct, Forge Era (frame 95,367) and Wagon Era (frame 361,950) both reached; but the diegetic invention council convened 20x and dispersed WITHOUT a verdict 17/20 times, only 5 proposals ever went pending, zero comparative elder judgments fired. ROOT-CAUSED AND HOT-FIXED THIS SLOT: 117/142 (82%) of all rejection_notes this session were 'id collides with a seed template' -- the regular (non-invention-only) turn's prompt template (USER_PROMPT_TEMPLATE / build_user_prompt in server.py) never told agents which structure ids were reserved; 'Approved custom builds:' only ever listed player-invented customs, never the base seed templates (forge/granary/market/library/house/farm_plot/workshop/wall) -- exactly the plausible village-noun names an LLM reaches for, and exactly why council proposers kept getting killed before two could go pending. The invention-ONLY prompt already had this right via structure_counts; only the far more common regular-turn path was blind. Fix (commit 00df296): new format_reserved_structure_ids() unions the always-current SEED_PROJECT_IDS global with approved-custom and pending-blueprint ids (mirrors build_invention_prompt's existing 'taken' set) and feeds a new 'Reserved structure ids: ...' prompt line, ~15-20 tokens, rendered every turn. Verified live via a standalone build_user_prompt() call: correctly lists all 8 seed ids plus a supplied pending id, and correctly EXCLUDES cart/wagon (confirmed those are RECIPES entries, not PROJECT_TEMPLATES -- caught and corrected an early wrong assumption before commit). py_compile clean. Prompt-only change, no gate/validation logic touched -- next slot's audit should show the 82%-cause collision rate drop and hopefully the council reaching its first comparative judgment. Phase E (ECONOMY_ENABLED): first organic Market build this cadence (frame 156,600), wealth_gini fell 0.772->0.503 by session end (11/19 housed), but priced trade still thin (one buy/sell pair all session). Phase F (LIFECYCLE_ENABLED): first natural deaths under the corrected aging rate observed and clean -- Sage died of old age at frame 321,900 ('Sage has died of old age at age 81'), succession resolved fast (Aria elected, electionId succession_321900, same session); two more natural deaths (Luna age 78 @455,100, Rex age 72 @470,400) needed no succession. heal_agent zombie-fix regression test now CLOSED: explicitly checked all three deaths for post-death heal_agent targeting or incapacitation-flag flips -- none found, only correct refusals and benign Library-study mentions of the deceased. Phase G (CULTURE_ENABLED): first organic soak confirms skills-by-practice (gather avg 0.01->9.97, practice_count 1->2838) and Library knowledge (3 entries across 3 deaths, passive study firing from frame 345,750) both live and working; teaching (teach_count 0) and meme mutation (0 mutations) remain organically unexercised this session -- consistent with the implementation log's own known-low-signal framing, not a confirmed defect, still open. Chronicle grew 0->7. General health: 2,016 LM calls, 99.3% HTTP 200, 14 scattered self-recovering offline errors (0.7%), 0 context_overflow retries; both standing invariants held (no silent rejections, every gate has a deterministic escape). No design-level FAIL found. Per the batch schedule this cadence's phase table is now exhausted (Phase G was the last scheduled row; DIPLOMACY_ENABLED deliberately deferred out of the 5-phase batch), so this slot's work was audit + one hot-fix rather than a new phase -- no separate implementer subagent was spawned (the fix was a precise 3-function/1-line prompt-completeness bug, squarely inside hot-fix authority, not a batch item).
still_open: Phase C: watch structure_condition trend over a longer soak -- 95.3->69.7 avg this session as structure count nearly quadrupled; confirm it stabilizes rather than trending toward the 30 disrepair floor

Phase D: confirm next slot that the reserved-structure-ids hot-fix (00df296) actually drops the 82% id-collision rejection rate and lets the invention council reach its first comparative elder judgment

Phase G: teaching (teach_count still 0) and meme mutation (0 this session) remain organically unexercised in live play -- both are deterministic keyword/probability gates that just haven't hit their trigger conditions yet, watch for natural occurrence over more soak time
